payload.text: give the features as real like a profile in the account profile

**Refining the Account View**

I'm currently focused on enhancing the `Account` profile view to resemble a "real profile." The existing `App.tsx`'s `account` case provides a foundation: a summary with avatar, username, and email. Now I'm exploring the integration of privacy protocols like Network Discoverability and Mentor Support to enrich its features and mimic a true, modern user profile.


**Expanding the Account Details**

I'm now incorporating several new features into the account view to make it feel more complete. I'm focusing on adding a bio section, hackathon statistics, social links matrix, and a visual representation of badges/awards. These additions will use the existing "glass" design and high-contrast accents for visual consistency. I'm aiming to keep the layout of the account view in a similar layout to the "profile" view that I am aiming for.

entries.description: Enhance the Account view to look like a professional hacker profile with bio, stats, achievements, social links, and activity tracking.
